/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -pthread CMakeFiles/test_dist.dir/test_dist.cxx.o -o test_dist  -Wl,-rpath,/home/diego/Documents/SISSA/Projects/CI_solver/MACIS_build/tests/src/sparsexx:/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/openmpi/lib ../libsparsexx.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/openmpi/lib/libmpi_cxx.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/openmpi/lib/libmpi.so /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/9/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.so
